feed.title: SkillsLLM
feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, Claude Skills Hub, OpenRouter, LiteLLM (blog + releases), and Glama MCP Servers

entry.title: July Townhall: Product + Roadmap Updates
entry.content: Join the LiteLLM July townhall on Thursday, 23 July at 7:30 AM PT to learn about LiteLLM's product updates and roadmap.

entry.title: fleet
entry.content: Claude Code supervises a multi-provider fleet of AI coding workers (OpenAI Codex, Google Gemini CLI, Claude Code headless, and 75+ providers via OpenCode including DeepSeek, Qwen, and local LM Studio/Ollama models) as background subagents: registry-driven routing by capability, cost, and observed track record; parallel dispatch; per-provider rate-limit cooldowns with cascade fallback; verification-gated acceptance; and an outcome ledger that makes routing smarter with use. NOTE: runs unattended agents (file edits + command execution, no approval prompts) inside your repo — read the README warning before installing; use only in repos you trust. The skill itself follows the Agent Skills open standard and also runs under Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and other compatible supervisors (see install.sh).

entry.title: appdirect
entry.content: Agent skills for AppDirect marketplace work — app submission runbook (100% profile-completion) and platform API integration (OAuth, GraphQL mutations, event endpoints, SSO).

entry.title: ai-sdlc-harness
entry.content: AI-driven SDLC workflow harness for multi-repo development. Provides story refinement, multi-agent development (plan → code → review → test → PR), and automated guardrails via hooks. Supports Azure DevOps, Jira, GitLab, GitHub, Zoho, and local Markdown as work item providers; ADO, GitLab, GitHub, gh-cli, and glab-cli as git providers. Language-agnostic, discovery-driven; supports any language (frontend + backend).

entry.title: bigtable
entry.content: Official Claude plugin for Google Cloud Bigtable. Manage instances/tables, design schemas, query data using SQL or client libraries, and more

entry.title: auto-redbook-skills
entry.content: 小红书笔记自动创作技能：撰写内容、生成精美封面与正文卡片、可选一键发布。支持 8 种排版主题（sketch / neo-brutalism / botanical 等）和 4 种智能分页模式。

entry.title: ecc
entry.content: Battle-tested Claude Code plugin for engineering teams — 38 agents, 156 skills, 72 legacy command shims, production-ready hooks, and selective install workflows evolved through continuous real-world use

entry.title: calibre-mcp
entry.content: Calibre e-book library MCP server with 21 portmanteau tools for search, management, export, and RAG

entry.title: bkt
entry.content: Bitbucket CLI - manage repos, PRs, branches, issues, webhooks, and pipelines for both Data Center and Cloud

entry.title: oh-my-claudecode
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestration system for Claude Code

entry.title: dm
entry.content: Dungeon Master assistant for running persistent D&D 5e campaigns. Campaign creation/loading, character management, combat tracking, NPC generation, dice rolling, an optional live display companion, and full session state — all persisted across sessions. Provides the `dnd` skill; invoke as /dm:dnd, or just describe what you want once a campaign is loaded.

entry.title: nature-skills
entry.content: A growing collection of Claude-compatible academic workflow bundles for producing work at Nature-journal standard. Covers scientific figures (nature-figure), manuscript prose polishing (nature-polishing), manuscript drafting and methods writing (nature-writing), reviewer-style pre-submission assessment (nature-reviewer), citation retrieval and export (nature-citation), data availability statements and FAIR metadata (nature-data), paper-to-PPTX presentation conversion (nature-paper2ppt), literature search via MCP (nature-academic-search), paper reading and annotation (nature-reader), and peer-review response drafting (nature-response). Future releases planned: statistical reporting, cover letters, and review articles. Rules are derived from primary sources, including published Nature papers, journal author guidelines, and structured writing curricula.

entry.title: rust-skills
entry.content: Comprehensive Rust development assistant with meta-question routing, coding guidelines, version queries, and ecosystem support

entry.title: kicad-happy
entry.content: KiCad electronics design skills. Analyze schematics, review PCB layouts, download datasheets, source components, and prep boards for fabrication.

entry.title: oh-my-claudecode
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestration system for Claude Code

entry.title: panecho
entry.content: Drive the Panecho native macOS terminal (privacy-hardened fork of cmux) from Claude Code — workspaces, panes, surfaces, browser automation, notifications, sidebar metadata, session restore, and the privacy-mode rules agents must respect. Ships the Panecho control skill; pair with the panecho-recipes/ folder for copy-paste socket-API snippets.

entry.title: superpowers
entry.content: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques

entry.title: binface64-skills
entry.content: AI agent skills for BF64/Binface64 N64 game development across code, assets, audio, UI, and QA.

entry.title: carbon
entry.content: Build and audit enterprise, data-heavy B2B interfaces with the IBM Carbon Design System: Carbon components (React and Web Components), patterns, IBM Design Language styles and tokens, plus WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility and an axe-based conformance baseline.

entry.title: scholaraio
entry.content: A research infrastructure for AI agents. Search, read, and analyze papers from your local knowledge base while coding. Includes arXiv discovery, layered reading, ingestion, topic modeling, citation graphs, insights analytics, Office document inspection, scientific tool docs, and academic writing workflows. Requires Python 3.10+ and pip install.

entry.title: claude-cursor-orchestration
entry.content: Claude Code + Cursor Agent orchestration system. Delegates coding tasks to Cursor Agent via ACP bridge with Phase 0-8 pipeline.

entry.title: phobos
entry.content: Always-on efficiency discipline for Claude Code — triage token spend to task size, write minimal correct code, take fewer round-trips, keep context lean. Ships three skills plus guard/state/status hooks.

entry.title: ponytail
entry.content: Lazy senior dev mode. Forces the simplest, shortest solution that actually works: YAGNI, stdlib first, no unrequested abstractions.

entry.title: ecc
entry.content: Battle-tested Claude Code plugin for engineering teams — 58 agents, 220 skills, 74 legacy command shims, production-ready hooks, and selective install workflows evolved through continuous real-world use

entry.title: mattpocock-skills
entry.content: mattpocock-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: cc-skills-golang
entry.content: AI Agent Skills for production-ready Go projects

entry.title: humanizer-es
entry.content: Edita textos en español para que suenen naturales y humanos, no generados por IA. Adaptación nativa al español del Humanizer: detecta muletillas de IA, calcos del inglés, nominalización, simetría forzada, tono corporativo, raya al estilo inglés y mayúsculas de título a la inglesa. Maneja variantes (España, Latinoamérica, neutro).

entry.title: ecc
entry.content: Harness-native ECC plugin for engineering teams - 64 agents, 261 skills, 84 legacy command shims, reusable hooks, rules, MCP conventions, and operator workflows for Claude Code plus adjacent agent harnesses

entry.title: agentmail
entry.content: AI-native email infrastructure for coding agents. Create inboxes, send and receive emails, manage threads, and automate email workflows.

entry.title: medical-mcps
entry.content: Comprehensive biological and medical research data integration server providing unified access to 13+ specialized databases including Reactome (pathways), KEGG (pathways/diseases), UniProt (proteins), ChEMBL (drug discovery), PubMed (literature), GWAS Catalog (genetic associations), ClinicalTrials.gov (clinical trials), OpenFDA (drug safety), Pathway Commons (pathway data), Gene Ontology (gene functions), OMIM (genetic disorders), NCI Thesaurus (cancer terminology), OpenTargets (disease-target associations), and CTG (gene-disease). Offers 100+ tools through both a unified endpoint (all databases via single connection) and individual API endpoints. Features RFC 9111 compliant HTTP caching with 30-day TTL for optimal performance.

entry.title: andrej-karpathy-skills
entry.content: Adapted Andrej-Karpathy-style coding guidelines (personal fork)

entry.title: mutsuki
entry.content: Asagi Mutsuki mode. The little-devil chaos tester who breaks what claims to be fine: read the claim, dig the dirt, arm the cruel inputs, throw one bomb, prove the break. Love & Violence. Kufufu~

entry.content: Claude Code settings and skills for spec-driven development workflows

entry.title: auto-memory
entry.content: Automatically maintains CLAUDE.md files as codebases evolve using hooks, agents, and skills

entry.title: haiku-scribe
entry.content: Read-only Haiku scout subagent that compresses broad context (surveys, logs, transcripts, unfamiliar flow) into structured evidence, saving main-context headroom and stretching the Pro/Max cap.

entry.content: A research infrastructure for AI agents. Search, read, and analyze papers from your local knowledge base while coding. Includes arXiv discovery, layered reading, ingestion, topic modeling, citation graphs, insights analytics, Office document inspection, scientific tool docs, and academic writing workflows. entry.title: ecc
entry.content: Harness-native ECC plugin for engineering teams - 67 agents, 278 skills, 94 legacy command shims, reusable hooks, rules, MCP conventions, and operator workflows for Claude Code plus adjacent agent harnesses

entry.title: armitage-sales-ops
entry.content: Read-only HubSpot sales-operations reporting for Armitage portfolio companies. Config-driven skills — Onboard, Pipeline Health, Rep Scorecard, Deal Review, Lead Sourcing, Views Spec (generates a company-specific HubSpot admin build guide for the drill-down layer), and a board-grade Referral/Channel Growth report. Same code for every company; per-company config lives OUTSIDE the plugin. Never writes to HubSpot.

entry.title: everything-claude-code
entry.content: Complete collection of battle-tested Claude Code configs from an Anthropic hackathon winner - agents, skills, hooks, commands, and rules evolved over 10+ months of intensive daily use

entry.title: sdd-devkit
entry.content: Utilidades para el desarrollo de SDD (Spec-Driven Development): ADRs, historias de usuario, planificacion e implementacion de tareas y work items, definicion y trazabilidad de pruebas, migraciones y code review.

entry.content: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques

entry.title: kraken-cli
entry.content: Agent-first CLI for trading crypto, stocks, forex, and derivatives on Kraken. Paper trading by default; live trading opt-in via API keys.

entry.content: Agent-first CLI for trading crypto, stocks, forex, and derivatives on Kraken. Paper trading by default; live trading opt-in via API keys.

entry.content: Put your company into words. Guided, adaptive commands that capture and deepen company and product strategy as atomic, git-tracked markdown files.

entry.title: caveman
entry.content: Ultra-compressed communication mode. Cuts 65% of output tokens (measured) while keeping full technical accuracy by speaking like a caveman.

entry.content: Autonomous experiment loop for Claude Code — try an idea, measure it, keep what works, discard what doesn't, repeat. Inspired by karpathy/autoresearch.

entry.content: Plan-to-code pipeline: automated planning with 5-actor verification, then TDD execution with parallel agents. Formerly beast-plan.

entry.title: dogdoing
entry.content: Dogdoing (刀盾狗/我的刀盾) - A loyal shield-dog that participates in every task, splitting work as a subagent. Cheers with Wow-wow-wow when idle! | 一只永远不会缺席的工作犬，每个任务都插上一爪，没活就旺旺旺喝彩！

entry.title: hyperframes
entry.content: HyperFrames by HeyGen. Write HTML, render video. Compositions, GSAP and runtime adapter animations, captions, voiceovers, audio-reactive visuals, and website-to-video capture for HyperFrames.

entry.content: Codebase intelligence — semantic search workflows, dependency graph analysis, and context artifact exploration for SocratiCode

entry.title: bible-links
entry.content: Make portable route.bible Markdown links the default for Scripture references.

entry.title: ballerina
entry.content: Ballerina language support — LSP code intelligence for .bal files plus an AI coding assistant for writing integrations and services, discovering libraries from Ballerina Central, and running and testing projects.

entry.title: designlang
entry.content: Extract any website's design language and ship it. Five slash commands — /extract, /grade, /battle, /remix, /pack — wrap the designlang CLI to pull DTCG tokens, Tailwind/shadcn/Figma vars, motion + voice, generate shareable graded report cards, head-to-head battle pages, six-vocabulary remixes, and full downloadable design-system bundles.

entry.title: davinci-resolve
entry.content: Accurate DaVinci Resolve scripting API reference for AI agents — method signatures, return types, settings dictionaries, constants, object navigation, and deprecations.

entry.content: Easily create hooks to prevent unwanted behaviors by analyzing conversation patterns

entry.content: Create and edit React Native Storybook stories using Component Story Format (CSF). Includes controls reference, addon configuration, and portable story patterns.

entry.title: humanizer
entry.content: Remove signs of AI-generated writing from text, making it sound more natural and human. Based on Wikipedia's "Signs of AI writing" guide.

entry.title: adversarial-spec
entry.content: Iteratively refine product specs through multi-model debate until consensus. Claude actively participates alongside GPT, Gemini, Grok, and other models. Includes interview mode, early agreement verification, and optional Telegram integration.

entry.title: sapui5-cli
entry.content: Manages SAPUI5/OpenUI5 projects using the UI5 Tooling CLI (@ui5/cli). Use when initializing UI5 projects, configuring ui5.yaml or ui5-workspace.yaml files, building UI5 applications or libraries, running development servers with HTTP/2 support, creating custom build tasks or server middleware, managing workspace/monorepo setups, troubleshooting UI5 CLI errors, migrating between UI5 CLI versions, or optimizing build performance. Supports both OpenUI5 and SAPUI5 frameworks with complete configuration and extensibility guidance.

entry.title: tone-police
entry.content: Automatically filters angry, hostile, and profane language from user prompts before they reach Claude. Preserves intent while replacing hostility with constructive phrasing.

entry.title: sweep-skills
entry.content: Structural codebase sweeps that repair recurring defects and remove unnecessary complexity.

entry.title: ravenclaude-core
entry.content: Domain-neutral Team Lead + specialist-agents pattern for Claude Code: 15 specialists, 48 skills, gates, hooks, rules, templates. Capability Grounding Protocol, Structured Output Protocol, Researcher meta-skill, comfort-posture dashboard, opt-in command-review tribunal (the Thing), WebFetch sanitizer, branch-archive escape hatch, brand-extraction (homepage → brand kit), and declarative-visualization (Vega-Lite/Deneb/SVG, Gate 101 + Gate 103 svg-report-lint, viz-spec-reviewer). Slash commands: /init-agent-ready, /wrap, /set-posture, /dashboard, /forge, /reset-plugin-cache.

entry.title: qdrant
entry.content: Agent skills for Qdrant vector search: scaling, performance optimization, search quality, monitoring, deployment, edge, model migration, version upgrades, and SDK usage

entry.title: da-haetneundeyo
entry.content: 다 했는데요? — AI로 진행한 작업을 자동 기록해 주간/월간 업무 보고를 만들어주는 Claude Code 플러그인

entry.title: impeccable
entry.content: Design fluency for frontend development. 1 skill with 23 commands (/impeccable polish, /impeccable audit, /impeccable critique, etc.) and curated anti-pattern detection.

entry.title: ccctx
entry.content: Codebase-specific workflows for reviewing, updating, and implementing changes in the ccctx Go CLI.

entry.title: factory
entry.content: Multi-agent software evolution. Autonomously study, strategize, build, review, and evaluate code changes using specialist AI agents.

entry.title: agent-tools
entry.content: Skills and runtime integrations for Codex, Claude Code, and opencode

entry.title: my-codex-plugin
entry.content: A plugin that uses OpenAI Codex as an agent

entry.title: compound-engineering
entry.content: Brainstorm, plan, debug, review, and compound learnings with AI agents

entry.title: arxiv-tools
entry.content: Search papers across multiple sources, download full text (LaTeX/PDF), generate BibTeX entries, and look up who cited a paper.

entry.title: claudeclaw
entry.content: Cron-like daemon that runs Claude prompts on a schedule

entry.title: autopraxis
entry.content: Self-improving workflow skills for AI agents.

entry.title: metaswarm
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestration framework for Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and Codex CLI — 19 agents, 13 skills, 15 commands, quality gates, TDD enforcement

entry.title: create-pr
entry.content: カレントブランチをもとにConventional Commits形式のドラフトPRを作成する skill。リリースラベル定義 (~/.claude/skills-config/release-labels.md) を参照。

entry.title: session-retro
entry.content: Interactive session retrospectives — deterministic Stop/PreCompact triggers, batch-scoped diff- and event-log-driven interview, native memory entries. No external services.

entry.title: ddalkak
entry.content: Figma URL을 한 번에(딸깍) 코드로 뽑아내는 디자인→코드 파이프라인. design.md → 디자인 브릿지(JSON) → plan.md → code → 검증.

entry.title: kora-keychain-sync
entry.content: Sync solana-keychain dependency and generate signer adapters

entry.title: hephaestus
entry.content: Open Agent OS for Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor: meta-agent builder, A2A Hub routing, local ontology, memory/security gates.

entry.title: cortex
entry.content: Personal knowledge vault plugin — session recording, memory distillation, indexed retrieval

entry.title: claude-stt
entry.content: Speech-to-text input for Claude Code with live streaming dictation

entry.title: bunqueue
entry.content: AI-native job queue for Bun — skills, MCP server (73 tools), custom agent, SQLite persistence, cron, priorities, retries, DLQ, webhooks

entry.title: ngautopilot-angular
entry.content: Complete Angular-focused NgAutoPilot skills for upgrades, compatibility, architecture, testing, RxJS, performance, security, signals, and modernization.

entry.title: personal-plugin
entry.content: Personal Claude Code commands and skills for documentation review, architecture analysis, git workflows, document processing, and multi-source research

entry.title: biff-dev
entry.content: UNIX-style team communication for Claude Code: /who, /finger, /plan, /write, /read, /mesg, /tty, /last, /wall, /talk

entry.title: memo-api
entry.content: Interact with MaiMemo Open API for vocabulary, interpretations, mnemonics, notepads, phrases, and study data

entry.title: perfect-skill-suggester
entry.content: High-accuracy skill activation (88%+) with Dewey-like domain classification, dynamic tool catalog from skill index, weighted scoring, and three-tier confidence routing.

entry.title: ngautopilot-angular-microfrontends
entry.content: Focused Angular micro-frontends skills for shell contracts, compatibility gates, dependency sharing, ownership, observability, release governance, and rollback safety.

entry.title: ngautopilot-typescript
entry.content: TypeScript-focused skills for strict typing, DTO mappers, fundamentals, and safe modernization.

entry.title: rhesis
entry.content: Design, run, and analyze AI test suites on the Rhesis platform. Connects to the Rhesis MCP server and loads the rhesis skill for the full explore-plan-create-execute-analyze workflow.

entry.title: qa-ui
entry.content: 実装完了後のUI検証。既定は人間委譲 — QA-ID台帳のmanual項目ごとに前提・操作手順・確認点をまとめた実行手順書を組み立てて人間に依頼し、返答を台帳に記帳する (ChromeDevTools MCPは使わない)。ブラウザautomationは明示指示時のみのオプション。不合格は最小修正→該当QA-IDのみ再確認を原則最大3ラウンド (root causeが1行で確定する場合のみ+1)。台帳がある場合はauto判定の再実行ゲート+機械集計で完了判定する。

entry.title: claude-tweaks
entry.content: A structured workflow system for Claude Code — from idea capture through build, review, and wrap-up, tracked as a unified work record on GitHub Issues. Includes an LLM-as-judge recurring code-health sweep, browser automation, and QA pipeline.

entry.title: credo
entry.content: The mentor framework for Claude Code: a self-contained process layer with per-session modes, a work-item lifecycle with a hard Definition of Done, budget-aware autonomy, visual verification, and safety rules that travel into every subagent

entry.title: development
entry.content: General development workflow skills for committing, branch naming, and other git operations.

entry.title: story-import
entry.content: 逆向导入已有小说。将已写好的小说（半成品或完本）反向解析为标准项目目录结构，兼容后续写作流程。

entry.title: ngautopilot-css
entry.content: CSS and Angular style-boundary skills for content-aware layouts, selectors, and host custom properties.

entry.title: ngautopilot-quality
entry.content: Complete quality skills for ESLint, SonarQube, dead code, technical debt, and quality decision workflows.

entry.title: claude-plugins-validation
entry.content: Comprehensive validation, management, and standardization suite for Claude Code plugins and marketplaces. Includes 190+ validation rules, plugin lifecycle management, marketplace operations, health checks, security auditing, GitHub repo validation, plugin/marketplace repo scaffolding, and standardization tooling. Features severity hierarchy, --strict mode, language-aware token estimation, and universal plugin/marketplace templates.

entry.title: vox-dev
entry.content: Text-to-speech for Claude Code: /unmute, /mute, /vibe, /recap

entry.title: bpmn-plugin
entry.content: BPMN 2.0 workflow tools: XML generation from natural language/markdown, and conversion to Draw.io format. Includes bundled bpmn2drawio Python tool.

entry.title: finalize-plan
entry.content: プランモードで設計が確定した後、実装に移る直前に使用。分析ファイルからAC・MECE結果を読み込み、プランファイルにブランチ・QA手順を追記する。

entry.title: ngautopilot-core
entry.content: Core NgAutoPilot workflows for project intake, stack detection, skill routing, compatibility gates, and risk assessment.

entry.title: ngautopilot-quality-deadcode-sonar
entry.content: Dead-code and SonarQube skills for orphan files, unused exports, dead branches, complexity, duplication, coverage, and gate triage.

entry.title: ngautopilot-quality-lint
entry.content: Lint-focused quality skills for ESLint baseline hardening, disable governance, and safe autofix cleanup.

entry.title: polish-before-commit
entry.content: コミット前やPR作成前に、プロジェクト規約への準拠・パターン一貫性・実装/spec 整合性 (Ruby の delegate / def 撤去後に残る dead mock の検出と削除を含む) を確認・修正したい時に使用。

entry.title: bench
entry.content: peerbench — a panel of AI reviewers (Codex + Kimi + GLM + Qwen + MiMo) for Claude Code: automatic gating reviews (plans, code turns, pushes), agentic read-only code review, and on-demand bug hunts. Commands are /bench:*.

entry.title: kratos
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestrator for features, research, and project insights

entry.title: copilotkit
entry.content: AI agent skills for CopilotKit — setup, develop, integrate, debug, upgrade, and contribute to CopilotKit projects

entry.title: savvly
entry.content: Explore Savvly MCP: retirement projections, eligibility, comparisons, and FAQs for an SEC-registered fund that pairs full market upside with later-life longevity payouts.

entry.title: taste-skill
entry.content: Frontend design taste skills including brutalist, minimalist, soft, redesign, stitch, and more

entry.title: web-uplift
entry.content: Fully agentic modern-web quality auditing and fixing. The model gathers multi-modal evidence via raw-CDP primitives, judges 15 declarative principles against Modern Web Guidance, and hill-climbs guidance-backed fixes. No hard-coded checks, no fast path. Runs in your own agent session (your subscription).

entry.title: qe-framework
entry.content: QE Framework v8 — Claude/Codex SIVS loop with dual-target assets, lifecycle hooks, 28 skills, and 20 agents.

entry.title: workday-mcp
entry.content: Read-only Workday access for Claude — fetch your tasks, pay, benefits and compensation through your signed-in session

entry.title: openhop
entry.content: Animated data-flow diagrams your AI agent can write. Written by AI. Watched by humans.

entry.title: chrome-devtools-mcp
entry.content: Reliable automation, in-depth debugging, and performance analysis in Chrome using Chrome DevTools and Puppeteer

entry.title: schedule-reminder
entry.content: Persistent store for todos, events, deadlines and progress with pending/doing/done states; fires due reminders via Discord; stable CLI/JSON API other skills call.

entry.title: rig
entry.content: rig — a quality-gated AI workbench for Claude Code. Give /rig:go (the main entry) a natural-language task: it classifies the task, runs it in an isolated git worktree, and checks the result against an acceptance gate — the diff only lands in your working tree on an explicit accept. Track parallel tasks with /rig:go board; compose recipes, personas, and knowledge as reusable bricks. scripts/mcp_server.py exposes the same task/orchestrate operations over a stdlib-only MCP stdio server, so an external agent, CI, or another process can drive rig without a live Claude Code session — opt-in, no new engine, accept/discard safety unchanged. scripts/workbench.py record-commit/record-outcome/trace-commit close the loop from accept-time gate predictions to real production outcomes — link a commit to its task, record ok/incident, and reverse-look-up a commit to its original gate verdict with a revert-plan draft (never auto-applied). codex/skills/rig/SKILL.md, codex/hooks.json, and .codex/agents/security-reviewer.toml wire rig into Codex CLI's own native layer (Skills/Hooks/Subagent TOML) alongside the existing skill-symlink and --provider codex paths. scripts/host_adapters.py generalizes the Codex native-layer pattern to any host (Cursor added as a second, validating example) via a single per-host capability/hook-event/degrade table — no new host needs core changes. orchestrate.py run --provider anthropic hits the Anthropic Messages API directly to detect and transparently handle Fable 5's refusal-classifier/server-side-fallback (#297), instead of a gate silently failing on it. workbench.py confidence surfaces drill-measured per-reviewer detection rate as a supplementary signal alongside the pass/fail gate, recording reviewer_confidence into acceptance.json without touching gate logic itself. workbench.py diff inserts an AST-based semantic-diff summary for modified *.py files (signature vs. body-only vs. no-semantic-change), augmenting the text diff rather than replacing it. orchestrate.py mcp-scan statically analyzes the MCP server's own tool definitions across three adversarial lenses (attacker/defender/auditor) for shell/network over-permission, secret exposure, and hook-injection risk, and is wired into validate.py for CI. action.yml packages headless CI usage of orchestrate.py run --isolate as a composite GitHub Action, opening a PR only when the gate resolves DONE. orchestrate.py ab runs the same goal through multiple recipe variants concurrently, each in its own isolated worktree, and compares speed/retries/results. workbench.py new surfaces similar past tasks (Jaccard overlap on a rough tokenization, no embeddings) above the routing banner as a deja-vu hint, and talk-mode captures decisions/confirmed-assumptions/open-questions into a per-task talk-log.md once a task-id exists. The README documents a dogfooding workflow (digest/stats/drill --replay) for maintainers to measure rig's own gate efficacy, honestly scoped as manual today (no auto-published CI badge yet). orchestrate.py fleet --repos p1,p2,... aggregates multiple repositories' run/drill telemetry read-only, comparing per-persona reviewer detection rate across projects (with an --anonymize option for consulting/multi-client use). scripts/notify.py posts opt-in Slack/Teams webhook notifications (accept-pending, gate REJECT, escalation) via urllib only, no SDK dependency. A security/quality batch adds pre-generation secret masking before subagent dispatch, a Semgrep-to-single-criterion SAST adapter, a --rescan mode for already-imported skills, known-flaky-vs-regression test discernment, and observability findings bridged into concrete instrumentation implement steps. .rig/access.json (opt-in) restricts accept to an allowlist per task_type by identity (RIG_USER or git config user.name); --budget-minutes on workbench.py new flags an over-estimate task in status/board, advisory only. Gap prescriptions (orchestrate runs) now draft a ready-to-paste /rig:forge request naming the top rejecting reviewers for a recurring escalation (#268). workbench.py accept now writes a locally-signed (HMAC-SHA256) provenance.json for each accepted task; verify-provenance checks the signature and exits 1 on tamper — same-machine tamper-evidence, not third-party public verification (#299). An experimental, opt-in orchestrate.py backend (cfg["parallel_backend"]="managed-agents") delegates review-gate fan-out to the Anthropic Managed Agents API (coordinator/worker beta) instead of the default subprocess+ThreadPoolExecutor path, verified against a mock HTTP server only (#295). vscode-extension/ is a read-only VS Code sidebar view of .rig/runs/ task/gate state (no accept/discard or any write command registered), parsing the same JSON workbench.py already writes; its state-parsing logic is unit-tested with plain Node (#286). workbench.py instincts manages .rig/instincts.jsonl, a continuous cross-session layer of lightweight, confidence-scored, unverified patterns (separate from facets/knowledge); secrets/local-paths/env-assignments are rejected outright, unused instincts decay and expire, conflicting ones are muted via explicit --supersedes, and only high-confidence ones are injected at session start via hooks/inject-instincts.sh, with hooks/suggest-instincts.sh prompting the model to propose new ones (#306). workbench.py cockpit is a read-only Mission Control screen aggregating the run timeline, gate radar, drill-measured reviewer confidence, a cost meter, and a force-bypass safety strip by reusing board/stats/audit/confidence's existing aggregation functions, with no new persistence and no accept/discard performed from cockpit itself (#307). scripts/prose_rhythm.py deterministically measures Japanese prose-rhythm surface proxies (sentence-beat runs, ending repetition, paragraph uniformity, progress narration, connective density) as an advisory pre-pass for the de-ai-smell flow, grounded in the cognitive-rhythm principle added to knowledge/ai-writing-smells.

entry.title: tdoc
entry.content: Prompt-native interactive HTML docs — open-source community implementation of Jesse Pollak's bdocs idea. Generate self-contained HTML from a prompt, comment on text + artifacts, publish to your own Cloudflare Worker for free always-on sharing.

entry.title: arc-1
entry.content: SAP ABAP development for Claude Code: bundles the ARC-1 MCP server (read/write/search/activate/lint/diagnose ABAP via the ADT REST API) with best-practice skills for RAP services, CDS modelling, ABAP Unit tests, clean-core audits, and UI5 modernization. Read-only by default; opt-in write gates.

entry.title: todos
entry.content: Per-project todo tracking with a relational project-knowledge brain — decisions, business rules, contradictions, stakeholders, scope changes — and a local broadsheet dashboard at localhost:5757. Plan, sync, build, design, and close out implementation work; capture decisions/rules/contradictions to remember later.

entry.title: claude-hud
entry.content: Real-time statusline HUD for Claude Code - context health, tool activity, agent tracking, and todo progress

entry.title: graehamwatts-skills
entry.content: Graeham Watts personal skills vault: content creation engine, CMA generator, disclosure analyzer, offer analyzer, GHL CRM audit, content calendar, listing tools, and the Watts content+video pipeline. Publishing handled via the Composio workflow (see shared-references/publishing-via-composio.md).

entry.title: baseline
entry.content: Drift-correction routes that inject trusted baseline docs through Claude Code and Codex hooks.

entry.title: forgedock
entry.content: Autonomous AI development pipeline that uses GitHub as a structured knowledge graph for Claude Code agents. Adds /work-on, /review-pr, /quality-gate, /orchestrate, and 20+ pipeline commands.

entry.title: promotion-assistant
entry.content: Automate multi-channel product promotion (email/posts/forum/DM), track conversion funnel, self-tune via feedback.

entry.title: yevice
entry.content: Estimate AWS / GCP cloud costs from CloudFormation / Terraform / Cloudflare Wrangler templates using the yevice Rust CLI. Includes a Claude Skill that drives generate / eval / sensitivity / optimize workflows and interactively fills the parameter file.

entry.title: resonance
entry.content: An operator-grade AI skill stack for builders. Elite, domain-tested skills and structured /commands for every stage of the product lifecycle: strategy, design, engineering, marketing, sales, and ops. Cross-tool: Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, opencode.

entry.title: rubber-duck
entry.content: rubber-duck — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: nojs
entry.content: Provides expert-level knowledge of the No.JS HTML-first reactive framework for building dynamic web applications using only HTML attributes.

entry.title: claude-status-bar
entry.content: Menu bar status indicator for Claude Code: animated spark, elapsed timer, and open/close lifecycle.

entry.title: finops
entry.content: FinOps 교재·2026 프레임워크를 4단계(WHY→Inform→Optimize→Operate) + 검증·PPT로 HBT 가상 기업 데이터에 적용해 체득하는 멀티클라우드 FinOps + FinOps for AI 실습 플러그인

entry.title: zotero-skills
entry.content: Full Zotero CRUD: search, add, update, delete items with notes, tags, and collections (PDF upload via raw pyzotero). Dual local/Web API routing.

entry.title: merge-unified
entry.content: Claude Code skills for integrating with and building on the Merge Unified API

entry.title: search-chats
entry.content: Search and extract Claude Code chat history with keyword matching, session extraction, and local LLM analysis

entry.title: para-skills
entry.content: PARA-Programming methodology - cross-client Agent Skills package for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, and Gemini CLI

entry.title: understudy
entry.content: Improve LLM apps and agents from real traces — reduce cost/latency, raise quality/reliability, capture traces, build evals, run local optimization (GEPA), compare models/providers, and route through Understudy.

entry.title: capture
entry.content: Generic app state capture — screenshots, HAR, console, logs via CDP

entry.title: gnomcp
entry.content: Gno smart-contract skill + MCP server for gno.land: interrealm semantics, security auditing, Render() authoring, idiomatic patterns, and on-chain tools (read, deploy, call, sessions).

entry.title: mainbranch
entry.content: Main Branch Claude Code skills for running a business from markdown files in git.

entry.title: alemtuzlak-skills
entry.content: Personal AI agent skills — technical Slidev presentations, courses, marketing content (brief, blog, social, newsletter), changelogs, architecture impact docs, and rendered promo videos. Built for Claude Code, Copilot, Codex, Gemini & Cursor.

entry.title: larch
entry.content: Multi-agent workflow automation for Claude Code: issue-anchored `/design` (one direct-drafting flow; plan-review panel), `/bug` (consumer issue-filing helper), `/deps` issue dependency audits, and `/implement` (positional `<issue-N>`, fixed 7200s Step 2 timeout, optional `--merge`, `--forked`, `--draft`, `--no-admin-fallback`, `--no-logs-commit`, `--coder`, `--run-id`). `/implement` Preflight reads the `larch:plan` block from the issue body; `/implement` Step 5 code review always uses the unified strict panel internally (public `--panel` argv removed).

entry.title: radical-pipelines
entry.content: An agent orchestrator that runs teams of agents autonomously through a pipeline of defined phases, where each phase produces concrete, inspectable artifacts.

entry.title: claude-resources
entry.content: Takazudo's personal Claude Code resources: skills, commands, agents, hooks, and scripts.

entry.title: hoai
entry.content: HOAI channel for Claude Code. Chat through the HOAI desktop and mobile app with built-in access control. Pairs with a one time code, no account key to paste.

entry.title: checkly
entry.content: Checkly skills, agents, and commands for AI coding agents.

entry.title: passionfruit
entry.content: Bilingual Astro template that turns Claude Code into a web developer for non-technical users. Ships scaffolding skills for content, branding, and deployment.

entry.title: ilo
entry.content: Run builds, tests, and tooling inside reproducible containerized dev environments with the ilo CLI (shell, compose, devcontainer, devfile).

entry.title: huhhb
entry.content: Uhstray.io skills marketplace — curated Claude Code skills including uhh:memory.

entry.title: nu-fluency
entry.content: Recalibrates the model toward idiomatic Nushell skills, slash commands, and a soft post-tool-use hook that nudges away from common bash-translation patterns.

entry.title: trinity-vsa-framework
entry.content: Trinity VSA/FPGA development framework with custom skills, hooks, and MCP integration for ternary computing

entry.title: semlang
entry.content: SemLang skills and MCP tools for semantic modeling, ontology authoring, and Malloy-backed analysis.

entry.title: ai-tools-mcp
entry.content: Hosted-API research, local Ollama delegation, and session-management MCP server. Exposes Perplexity Sonar (quick) and Sonar Pro (deep) research, Perplexity Agent API Search-as-Code (bulk, sandboxed), Google Gemini Deep Research (async, long-form), local Ollama for sensitive/private input and mechanical text work, and conversation-session persistence. Includes slash commands, routing skills, and a session-start preflight hook.

entry.title: warrantos
entry.content: Every claim ships with a source, a [CITE NEEDED], or a logged BLOCK. WarrantOS gates AI-assisted writing before it ships and logs every miss to a portable ledger.

entry.title: codex-first

entry.content: Inject into any Windows x64 process and inspect memory, disassemble code, scan patterns, set breakpoints — all from Claude Code. 31 skills for reverse engineering workflows.

entry.title: ghidra-cli
entry.content: Ghidra + ILSpy CLI skills and the ghidra reverse-engineering agent

entry.title: understand-anything
entry.content: AI-powered codebase understanding — analyze, visualize, and explain any project

entry.title: apple-mail
entry.content: Natural language interface for Apple Mail and Apple Calendar: search, compose, triage, organize, analyze, and verify email drafts, plus bounded calendar reads, conflict-checked event creation, availability search, and gated event management with 41 MCP tools and bundled Claude Code workflow skills (Mail operator, triage, inbox zero, taxonomy, archiving, Mail rules advisor, drafting, attachments, writing style, calendar operator, meeting scheduler)

entry.title: arscontexta
entry.content: Conversational derivation engine — generate agent-native memory architecture from natural conversation. 15 kernel primitives, 26 commands, 17 feature blocks, 3 presets.

entry.title: ui-ux-pro-max
entry.content: UI/UX design intelligence. 67 styles, 161 palettes, 57 font pairings, 25 charts, 15 stacks (React, Next.js, Vue, Svelte, Astro, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, Nuxt, Jetpack Compose). Actions: plan, build, create, design, implement, review, fix, improve, optimize, enhance, refactor, check UI/UX code. Projects: website, landing page, dashboard, admin panel, e-commerce, SaaS, portfolio, blog, mobile app. Elements: button, modal, navbar, sidebar, card, table, form, chart. Styles: glassmorphism, claymorphism, minimalism, brutalism, neumorphism, bento grid, dark mode, responsive, skeuomorphism, flat design. Topics: color palette, accessibility, animation, layout, typography, font pairing, spacing, hover, shadow, gradient.

entry.title: stagehand
entry.content: Browser automation skill for Claude Code using Stagehand. Automate web interactions, extract data, and navigate websites using natural language.

entry.title: ecc
entry.content: Harness-native ECC plugin for engineering teams - 64 agents, 262 skills, 84 legacy command shims, reusable hooks, rules, MCP conventions, and operator workflows for Claude Code plus adjacent agent harnesses

entry.title: orca
entry.content: Autonomous multi-agent development: init/doctor once, then orca:feature from idea to integration branch, orca:debug from symptom to diagnosis and fix, and orca:review to walk the deliverable in your own editor.

entry.title: workmux-status
entry.content: Display Claude agent status in tmux window names via workmux

entry.title: last30days
entry.content: Research any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Hacker News, Polymarket, GitHub, and 5+ more sources. AI agent scores by upvotes, likes, and real money - not editors.

entry.title: marketing-skills
entry.content: Marketing skills for AI agents — conversion optimization, copywriting, SEO, paid ads, ad creative, generative media (muapi.ai), and growth

entry.title: projectops
entry.content: DevOps 자동화 스킬 모음 - 코드 분석, 설계, 구현, 테스트, 리뷰, 리팩토링, 문서화, 트러블슈팅 등 23+ 스킬

entry.title: academic-research-skills
entry.content: Production-grade academic research pipeline for Claude Code: research → write → review → revise → finalize. 4 skills, 27 modes, 39-agent ensemble, v3.7.3 + v3.8 L3 claim-faithfulness gate, v3.9.0 cross-index triangulation, v3.10 triangulation policy layer, v3.11 deterministic citation verification gate (#182).

entry.title: academic-research-skills
entry.content: Production-grade academic research pipeline for Claude Code: research → write → review → revise → finalize. 4 skills, 27 modes, 39-agent ensemble, v3.7.3 + v3.8 L3 claim-faithfulness gate, v3.9.0 cross-index triangulation, v3.10 triangulation policy layer, v3.11 deterministic citation verification gate (#182).

entry.title: last30days
entry.content: Research any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Hacker News, Polymarket, GitHub, and 5+ more sources. AI agent scores by upvotes, likes, and real money - not editors.

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entry.title: relay
entry.content: Relay persistent session handoffs: save, resume, list, park, sidekick, return, continue, and regen topic-bound records that carry distilled runtime context into later sessions.

entry.title: learn-with-coursera
entry.content: Turn any learning intent into a personalized Coursera experience. Asks three quick questions (topic, familiarity, preferred format), searches Coursera's catalog, and delivers the right next step — a course, hands-on project, short video, or live roleplay — then maps a path forward. Requires the Coursera connector for catalog tools.

entry.title: zetetic-team-subagents
entry.content: 97 genius reasoning patterns from history's greatest minds. One epistemic standard none of them can bypass.

entry.title: carta-investors
entry.content: Carta Investors plugin — skills for querying investors data, performance benchmarks, regulatory reporting, AGM deck generation, brand extraction, and more via the Carta MCP server

entry.title: cortex
entry.content: Persistent memory for Claude Code — remembers across sessions automatically. Install and forget. Scientific retrieval backed by 97 published references.

entry.title: review-workflow
entry.content: Iterative code-review loop — review the diff, fix critical/major/minor issues, commit each round, re-review until clean. Project-agnostic.

entry.title: wasp
entry.content: Enhances Claude for developing full-stack web apps with Wasp (React, Node.js, Prisma)
